---
title: "phyloP and SpliceAI Analysis v3"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    fig.width: 12
    fig.height: 8
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(ggrepel)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Set base path
base_path <- "/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF"

# Load phyloP decoy data v3
phylop_data <- fread(file.path(base_path, "results", "phyloP", "decoysv3", "phyloP_decoy_v3_merged.tsv"), 
                     sep = "\t", 
                     header = TRUE)

# Rename MAF_file to decoyID for consistency
setnames(phylop_data, "MAF_file", "decoyID")

cat("Loaded phyloP decoy data v3:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(phylop_data), "\n")
cat("  Columns:", paste(colnames(phylop_data), collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Load SpliceAI v3.1 data
spliceai_data <- fread(file.path(base_path, "results", "splice_out_v3.1", "all_spliceai_scores_v3.1.tsv"),
                       sep = "\t",
                       header = TRUE)

cat("\nLoaded SpliceAI v3.1 data:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(spliceai_data), "\n")
cat("  Total columns:", ncol(spliceai_data), "\n")
```

## Parse SpliceAI Data

```{r parse-spliceai}
# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract max1 (canonical splice score)
parse_spliceai_max1 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  max1 <- as.numeric(match_result[2])
  if (is.na(max1) || max1 == -1.0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(max1)
}

# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract max2 (decoy splice score)
parse_spliceai_max2 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  max2 <- as.numeric(match_result[4])
  if (is.na(max2) || max2 == -1.0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(max2)
}

# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract pos2 (position of max2)
parse_spliceai_pos2 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  pos2 <- as.integer(match_result[5])
  if (is.na(pos2) || pos2 == -1) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(pos2)
}

# Get species columns (all except decoyID)
species_cols <- setdiff(colnames(spliceai_data), "decoyID")

# Parse all data into long format
parsed_data_list <- list()

for (species in species_cols) {
  # Extract max1, max2, and pos2 for each species
  max1_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_max1)
  max2_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_max2)
  pos2_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_pos2)
  
  # Create data frame for this species
  species_data <- data.frame(
    decoyID = spliceai_data$decoyID,
    species = species,
    max1 = max1_values,
    max2 = max2_values,
    pos2 = pos2_values,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  parsed_data_list[[species]] <- species_data
}

# Combine all species data
all_spliceai_parsed <- bind_rows(parsed_data_list)

# Filter out NA values
all_spliceai_parsed <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  filter(!is.na(max1) | !is.na(max2))

cat("\nParsed SpliceAI data:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(all_spliceai_parsed), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max1:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$max1)), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max2:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$max2)), "\n")
cat("  Data points with pos2:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$pos2)), "\n")
```

## Violin Plot: max1 vs max2

```{r violin-plot-max1-max2}
# Prepare data for violin plot
violin_data <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  select(decoyID, max1, max2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(max1, max2),
               names_to = "score_type",
               values_to = "score") %>%
  filter(!is.na(score))

# Create violin plot
p_violin <- ggplot(violin_data, aes(x = score_type, y = score, fill = score_type)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("max1" = "darkgreen", "max2" = "salmon"),
                    labels = c("max1" = "Canonical (max1)", "max2" = "Decoy (max2)")) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of SpliceAI Scores: max1 (Canonical) vs max2 (Decoy)",
       x = "Score Type",
       y = "SpliceAI Score",
       fill = "Score Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_violin)

cat("\nSummary statistics:\n")
violin_data %>%
  group_by(score_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(score, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(score, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print()
```

## Density Plot: max1 vs max2

```{r density-plot-max1-max2}
# Prepare data for density plot
density_data <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  select(decoyID, max1, max2) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(max1, max2),
               names_to = "score_type",
               values_to = "score") %>%
  filter(!is.na(score))

# Find HNRNPH1_179620582 max2 value for annotation
hnrnph1_max2_value <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  filter(decoyID == "HNRNPH1_179620582") %>%
  summarise(max2_value = max(max2, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(max2_value)

# Calculate density at HNRNPH1 max2 value for positioning the label
if (!is.na(hnrnph1_max2_value) && !is.infinite(hnrnph1_max2_value)) {
  max2_density_data <- density_data %>% filter(score_type == "max2" & !is.na(score))
  if (nrow(max2_density_data) > 0) {
    density_obj <- density(max2_density_data$score)
    # Find closest density value
    density_idx <- which.min(abs(density_obj$x - hnrnph1_max2_value))
    hnrnph1_density_y <- density_obj$y[density_idx]
  } else {
    hnrnph1_density_y <- NA
  }
} else {
  hnrnph1_max2_value <- NA
  hnrnph1_density_y <- NA
}

# Create density plot
p_density <- ggplot(density_data, aes(x = score, fill = score_type, color = score_type)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  # Add vertical line for HNRNPH1 max2 value
  {if (!is.na(hnrnph1_max2_value) && !is.infinite(hnrnph1_max2_value))
    geom_vline(xintercept = hnrnph1_max2_value, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1)} +
  # Add label for HNRNPH1
  {if (!is.na(hnrnph1_max2_value) && !is.infinite(hnrnph1_max2_value) && !is.na(hnrnph1_density_y))
    annotate("text",
             x = hnrnph1_max2_value,
             y = hnrnph1_density_y,
             label = "HNRNPH1_179620582",
             color = "red",
             size = 4,
             fontface = "bold",
             hjust = 0,
             vjust = -0.5)} +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("max1" = "darkgreen", "max2" = "salmon"),
                    labels = c("max1" = "Canonical (max1)", "max2" = "Decoy (max2)")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("max1" = "darkgreen", "max2" = "salmon"),
                     labels = c("max1" = "Canonical (max1)", "max2" = "Decoy (max2)")) +
  labs(title = "Density Distribution of SpliceAI Scores: max1 (Canonical) vs max2 (Decoy)",
       subtitle = "HNRNPH1_179620582 max2 value highlighted",
       x = "SpliceAI Score",
       y = "Density",
       fill = "Score Type",
       color = "Score Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_density)
```

## Scatter Plot: max1 and max2 vs phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300

```{r scatter-plot-spliceai-vs-phylop}
# Merge SpliceAI and phyloP data
# First, get max values per decoyID (across all species)
decoy_max_values <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  group_by(decoyID) %>%
  summarise(
    max1_overall = max(max1, na.rm = TRUE),
    max2_overall = max(max2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  # Replace -Inf with NA if all values were NA
  mutate(
    max1_overall = ifelse(is.infinite(max1_overall), NA, max1_overall),
    max2_overall = ifelse(is.infinite(max2_overall), NA, max2_overall)
  )

# Merge with phyloP data
scatter_data <- decoy_max_values %>%
  left_join(phylop_data, by = "decoyID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(fraction_sites_ge_300) & fraction_sites_ge_300 > 0) %>%
  # Prepare data for plotting with both max1 and max2
  pivot_longer(cols = c(max1_overall, max2_overall),
               names_to = "score_type",
               values_to = "max_score",
               names_prefix = "_overall") %>%
  filter(!is.na(max_score))

# Find HNRNPH1_179620582 max2 data point for annotation
hnrnph1_scatter <- scatter_data %>%
  filter(decoyID == "HNRNPH1_179620582" & score_type == "max2")

cat("\nScatter plot data:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(scatter_data), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max1:", sum(scatter_data$score_type == "max1"), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max2:", sum(scatter_data$score_type == "max2"), "\n")

# Create scatter plot
p_scatter <- ggplot(scatter_data, aes(x = max_score, y = fraction_sites_ge_300, color = score_type)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8) +
  # Add HNRNPH1 point
  {if (nrow(hnrnph1_scatter) > 0)
    geom_point(data = hnrnph1_scatter,
               aes(x = max_score, y = fraction_sites_ge_300),
               color = "red",
               size = 3,
               shape = 21,
               fill = "red",
               alpha = 0.9)} +
  # Add HNRNPH1 label
  {if (nrow(hnrnph1_scatter) > 0)
    annotate("text",
             x = hnrnph1_scatter$max_score[1],
             y = hnrnph1_scatter$fraction_sites_ge_300[1],
             label = "HNRNPH1_179620582",
             color = "red",
             size = 4,
             fontface = "bold",
             hjust = 0,
             vjust = -0.5)} +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("max1" = "darkgreen", "max2" = "salmon"),
                     labels = c("max1" = "Canonical (max1)", "max2" = "Decoy (max2)")) +
  labs(title = "SpliceAI Scores vs phyloP Fraction Sites (>= 300)",
       subtitle = "max1 (Canonical) and max2 (Decoy) scores | HNRNPH1_179620582 highlighted",
       x = "Max SpliceAI Score",
       y = "Fraction Sites (phyloP >= 300)",
       color = "Score Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right")

print(p_scatter)
```

## Scatter Plot: max2 vs phyloP fraction_sites_ge_300 with Correlation

```{r scatter-plot-max2-vs-phylop}
# Prepare data for max2 only scatter plot
max2_scatter_data <- decoy_max_values %>%
  left_join(phylop_data, by = "decoyID") %>%
  filter(!is.na(max2_overall) & !is.na(fraction_sites_ge_300) & fraction_sites_ge_300 > 0)

# Calculate correlation
correlation <- cor(max2_scatter_data$max2_overall, max2_scatter_data$fraction_sites_ge_300, use = "complete.obs")

cat("\nMax2 vs phyloP correlation:\n")
cat("  Correlation coefficient:", round(correlation, 4), "\n")
cat("  Number of data points:", nrow(max2_scatter_data), "\n")

# Find HNRNPH1_179620582 for annotation
hnrnph1_max2_scatter <- max2_scatter_data %>%
  filter(decoyID == "HNRNPH1_179620582")

# Create scatter plot with correlation line
p_scatter_max2 <- ggplot(max2_scatter_data, aes(x = max2_overall, y = fraction_sites_ge_300)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.8, color = "salmon") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "darkblue", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.3) +
  # Add HNRNPH1 point
  {if (nrow(hnrnph1_max2_scatter) > 0)
    geom_point(data = hnrnph1_max2_scatter,
               aes(x = max2_overall, y = fraction_sites_ge_300),
               color = "red",
               size = 3,
               shape = 21,
               fill = "red",
               alpha = 0.9)} +
  # Add HNRNPH1 label
  {if (nrow(hnrnph1_max2_scatter) > 0)
    annotate("text",
             x = hnrnph1_max2_scatter$max2_overall[1],
             y = hnrnph1_max2_scatter$fraction_sites_ge_300[1],
             label = "HNRNPH1_179620582",
             color = "red",
             size = 4,
             fontface = "bold",
             hjust = 0,
             vjust = -0.5)} +
  labs(title = "max2 (Decoy) SpliceAI Scores vs phyloP Fraction Sites (>= 300)",
       subtitle = paste0("Correlation = ", round(correlation, 4), " | HNRNPH1_179620582 highlighted"),
       x = "Max SpliceAI Score (max2 - Decoy)",
       y = "Fraction Sites (phyloP >= 300)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12))

print(p_scatter_max2)
```

## Scatter Plot: HNRNPH1 max2 vs pos2

```{r scatter-plot-hnrnph1-max2-pos2}
# Load species mapping to get common names
species_mapping <- fread(file.path(base_path, "results", "tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv"), 
                         sep = "\t", 
                         header = TRUE)

# Create lookup: species_id -> matched_common_name
species_id_to_common <- setNames(species_mapping$matched_common_name, species_mapping$species_id)

# Filter for HNRNPH1_179620582 and extract max2 and pos2
hnrnph1_data <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  filter(decoyID == "HNRNPH1_179620582") %>%
  filter(!is.na(max2) & !is.na(pos2)) %>%
  # Add common names
  mutate(
    common_name = ifelse(species %in% names(species_id_to_common),
                        species_id_to_common[species],
                        species)
  )

cat("\nHNRNPH1_179620582 data:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(hnrnph1_data), "\n")
cat("  Species with max2 and pos2:", nrow(hnrnph1_data), "\n")

if (nrow(hnrnph1_data) > 0) {
  # Create scatter plot with color scaling by max2 (blue to red gradient like ggtree)
  p_hnrnph1_max2_pos2 <- ggplot(hnrnph1_data, aes(x = pos2, y = max2, color = max2)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    # Add floating labels with common names
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = common_name),
                    size = 2.5,
                    min.segment.length = 0,
                    segment.size = 0.3,
                    segment.color = "gray50",
                    box.padding = 0.5,
                    point.padding = 0.3,
                    max.overlaps = Inf,
                    show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "blue", high = "red", 
                        name = "max2 Score",
                        guide = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)) +
    labs(title = "HNRNPH1_179620582: max2 Score vs Position (pos2)",
         subtitle = "Points colored by max2 score (blue = low, red = high) | Labels show common species names",
         x = "Position (pos2)",
         y = "max2 Score (Decoy SpliceAI)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.position = "right")
  
  print(p_hnrnph1_max2_pos2)
  
  # Print summary statistics
  cat("\nSummary statistics:\n")
  cat("  Mean max2:", round(mean(hnrnph1_data$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Median max2:", round(median(hnrnph1_data$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Min max2:", round(min(hnrnph1_data$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Max max2:", round(max(hnrnph1_data$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Mean pos2:", round(mean(hnrnph1_data$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("  Median pos2:", round(median(hnrnph1_data$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("  Min pos2:", min(hnrnph1_data$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Max pos2:", max(hnrnph1_data$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
} else {
  cat("  No data found for HNRNPH1_179620582 with both max2 and pos2\n")
}
```
